description: Reconcile the three conflicting frontend<->backend port schemes so `pnpm dev` actually connects. Today each Next app has: a backend PORT (quantmail 3010, quantai 3020, quantchat 3002, quantdocs 3040, quantdrive 3050, quantcalendar 3060, quantmeet 3022), a DIFFERENT Next proxy *_BACKEND_URL default (quantmail 3001, quantai 3002, quantchat 3108, quantdocs 3105, quantdrive 3106, quantcalendar 3104, quantmeet 3107), and yet another set in .env.local.example. None agree. Establish one source of truth via @quant/service-discovery and align every default.
steps: Define the canonical port map in packages/service-discovery/src/index.ts: one entry per app backend (name -> port), reusing the backend/app.ts PORT defaults as the canonical values.

For each Next app, set the proxy default to the canonical backend port: update apps/<app>/src/app/api/**/route.ts (or a shared lib) so *_BACKEND_URL defaults to the matching backend PORT (e.g. QUANTMAIL_BACKEND_URL default = http://localhost:3010, not 3001).

Fix per-app frontend API base mismatches found in audit: quantmail apiClient hardcodes localhost:3001 (should match backend); quantchat uses 3 different targets across hooks (apiClient->chat.quant.app, stories->relative /api, useChat->ws://localhost:3001) - unify to env-driven values; quantai Next route targets :3002 path /assistant/* while backend is :3020 with /sessions,/agents - align route base + path prefixes.
Add every backend/proxy port + WS URL to .env.example and .env.local.example with consistent names (QUANT<APP>_BACKEND_URL, QUANT<APP>_PORT, QUANT<APP>_WS_URL) and matching values.
Add a tiny smoke script (scripts/check-ports.ts or extend scripts/doctor.ts) that asserts each Next proxy default equals the corresponding backend PORT (fail CI on drift).
acceptance_criteria: Every Next app's *_BACKEND_URL default equals its backend's PORT default
service-discovery is the single source of truth for ports
quantmail/quantchat/quantai frontend API targets are env-driven and correct (no stray localhost:3001 / chat.quant.app / wrong path)
.env.example documents all backend/proxy/WS vars with consistent values
A doctor/check asserts no port drift; pnpm typecheck + build green
